# NAB 2026 Live

> Twice-daily AI-newsroom aggregator for NAB Show 2026 in Las Vegas (April 18–22, 2026). Floor announcements, summit coverage, and industry analyst commentary for people who can't attend.

## Coverage

- Floor news: product launches, press releases, vendor announcements
- Streaming Summit (April 20–21): sessions on streaming economics, AI workflows, live sports
- Sports Summit (April 19–22): broadcast production, stadium tech, sports rights
- Online buzz: analyst commentary and trending topics

## Site structure

- Homepage: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/
- Stories: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/story/{slug}
- Topic pages: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/topic/{tag}
- RSS feed: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/sitemap.xml
- About: https://nab2026.apps.osaas.io/about

## Editorial

Every story links to its primary source. No invented quotes or statistics. AI-drafted by a Claude Code agent team and published with a newsroom byline. Source code: https://github.com/Eyevinn/nab2026-news
